verdict.answer_first: A: sentence 1 gives the full prescription: "load from `.env` files locally, read from real environment variables in prod, validate everything at startup"; B also starts well but slightly less complete.
verdict.decisiveness: A: stronger single rule: "read `process.env` in exactly one module" and "The one rule that matters most"; B adds more side advice like APP_ENV/staging/preview.
verdict.actionability: A: easier to execute because it includes `.gitignore`, `.env.example`, `package.json` scripts, `config.js`, and a file layout convention.
